The CardEnterEvent is fired whenever a Card moves into a specific grid coordinate.

CardExitEvent - Class in component.modifier.pathway.event
The CardExitEvent is fired when a Card departs a tile, usually signifying it has reached a goal or terminal point in the path.

change(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.changer.Subtractor
Decreases the specified card's value.
change(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.changer.SuitSetter

Forces the target card's value to the rank stored in this modifier.

cleanup() - Method in class ui.levelinfo.LevelInfoPane

Attempts to apply a mathematical modification to the given card.

The primary entry point for a card entering a modification tile.
modify(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Absorber
Handles the two-step modification logic.
modify(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Duplicator
Executes the duplication logic.
modify(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Merger
Executes the merging logic.
modify(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Splitter
Executes the splitting logic.
modify(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Vaporizer

modify(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.Modifier

modify(Card) - Method in class component.modifier.pathway.Exit

MODIFY - Enum constant in enum class engine.TickPhase
The phase where Modifier components apply logic, arithmetic, or state changes to the card occupying their tile.
modifyAvailableMovers(String, int) - Method in class logic.PlayerInventory

Constructs a new phase-completion event.
MONOSPACE_FONT - Static variable in class util.Config

Singleton controller responsible for managing the logic behind placing, rotating, and dragging tiles/movers within the game grid.

PlacementPathBuilder.PlacementNode - Class in application.controller
Represents a single step in a placement path, containing position, direction, and intent (placement vs deletion).

A utility class that implements the A* pathfinding algorithm tailored for tile placement.
PlacementPathfinder() - Constructor for class application.path.PlacementPathfinder
 
PlacementPathfinder.CostFunction - Interface in application.path
A functional interface used to determine the cost of moving from one grid cell to another.
PlacementPathfinder.HeuristicFunction - Interface in application.path
A functional interface used to estimate the remaining distance to the target.
PlacementPathfinder.PathNode - Class in application.path
Represents a single point in the calculated path, consisting of a position and the direction the mover is facing at that position.
placeToGrid(GridPos) - Method in class logic.PlayerInventory

PLACING - Enum constant in enum class engine.GameState
The player is placing tiles and configuring the board.
PLASTIC - Enum constant in enum class component.card.Material
The standard material with no special properties or immunities.
play() - Static method in class engine.TickEngine

reset() - Method in class component.modifier.changer.Changer
Resets the modifier to its default state, specifically re-enabling it.
reset() - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Absorber
Resets the modifier, re-enabling it and clearing any stored card buffer.
reset() - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Combinator
Resets the combinator to its default state, specifically re-enabling it after it has been disabled.
reset() - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Duplicator
Resets the modifier, re-enabling it and deleting any unspawned clones.
reset() - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Merger
Resets the modifier, clearing any stored card data and re-enabling it if it was disabled.
reset() - Method in class component.modifier.combinator.Splitter
Resets the modifier, clearing the spawn buffer and re-enabling it if it was disabled.
reset() - Method in class component.modifier.Modifier
Resets the modifier to its initial level-start state.
reset() - Method in class component.modifier.pathway.Exit
Resets the exit's internal counters for level restarts.
reset() - Method in class component.modifier.pathway.Pathway
Resets the progression index to 0.
reset() - Method in class component.mover.FlipFlop
Resets the mover to its primary starting direction.
reset() - Method in class component.mover.Mover
Resets the mover's internal state for level restarts.
reset() - Static method in class engine.TickEngine
Stops the simulation, resets the level data via GameLevel.resetLevel(), and restores the engine to the initial GameState.PLACING state.
ResetEvent - Class in engine.event
The ResetEvent is a global command used to restore the game board and engine to their initial level-start conditions.
ResetEvent() - Constructor for class engine.event.ResetEvent
Constructs a new ResetEvent.
resetLevel() - Method in class logic.GameLevel
Resets the level to its initial state, removing all cards and resetting movers and modifiers.

The TickPhase enum represents the individual steps within a single game logic cycle.
